title: zichya glabrata
side_effects: Zichya glabrata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions in some individuals, which may result in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Overconsumption of the plant can also lead to stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels. Furthermore, improper use of the Zichya glabrata plant can cause cardiovascular issues, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure, which may be problematic for individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can even lead to kidney damage and failure if not treated promptly.
